en: You got a lot of nerve, don't you baby?
I only hit the curb Cause you made me your tail And all your friends
That I'm crazy Like I'm the only one
ko: 아마 넌 친구들한테 내가 미쳤다고 말하겠지, 마치 나만 그런 것처럼

en: If you had a wild hair of your own?
Living in your big glass house With a view I thought you knew
I had some help It ain't like I can make this kind of mess all by myself
ko: 도움을 좀 받았지, 이런 엉망진창을 혼자 만들 수는 없잖아

en: Don't act like you ain't helped me Pull that bottle off the shelf
ko: 선반에서 그 술병 꺼내는 거 도와주지 않은 척하지 마

en: Be deep in every weekend If you couldn't tell They say teamwork makes the dream work
ko: 매 주말마다 깊이 빠져 있었어, 모르겠다면
팀워크가 꿈을 이룬다고 하잖아, 나도 도움을 좀 받았지

en: You thought I'd take the blame For us to crumble and go around
ko: 네가 기어 다니는 건 내 탓이라고 생각했지
